    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTripId`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`shipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTripId`

SELECT `t0`.`Key` AS `Day`, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(`t0`.`amount`, 0.0)), 0.0) AS `Total`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`amount`, CONVERT(`t`.`createdAt`, date) AS `Key`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE ((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)) AND (((`t`.`createdAt` >= @__sevenDaysAgo_0) AND (`t`.`createdAt` < @__tomorrow_1)) AND ((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)))
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`Key`

    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTripId`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`shipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTripId`

    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTripId`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`shipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTripId`

) AS `t0`

FROM (

SELECT `t0`.`shipStatus` AS `ShipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTrip`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTrip`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`

) AS `t0`

SELECT `t0`.`shipStatus` AS `ShipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTrip`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTrip`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`

) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`shipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTrip`

WHERE (((`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)) AND (COALESCE(`t`.`tripID`, '') IN ('TRP-000001', 'TRP-000002', 'TRP-000003', 'TRP-000004', 'TRP-000005', 'TRP-000006', 'TRP-000007', 'TRP-000008', 'TRP-000009', 'TRP-000010', 'TRP-000011', 'TRP-000012', 'TRP-000013', 'TRP-000020', 'TRP-000021', 'TRP-000022', 'TRP-000024') AND ((`t`.`shipStatus` <> 'Đã giao') OR `t`.`shipStatus` IS NULL))) AND (((`t`.`senderPhone` LIKE @__searchPhone_1_contains) OR (`t`.`receiverPhone` LIKE @__searchPhone_1_contains)) OR (`t`.`orderID` LIKE @__searchPhone_1_contains_1))

SELECT `t0`.`shipStatus` AS `ShipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTrip`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTrip`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`shipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTrip`

SELECT `t0`.`shipStatus` AS `ShipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTrip`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTrip`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`
    WHERE (`t`.`isDeleted` IS NULL) OR NOT (`t`.`isDeleted`)
) AS `t0`
GROUP BY `t0`.`shipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTrip`

) AS `t0`

SELECT `t0`.`shipStatus` AS `ShipStatus`, `t0`.`HasTrip`, COUNT(*) AS `Count`
FROM (
    SELECT `t`.`shipStatus`, `t`.`tripID` IS NOT NULL AND (`t`.`tripID` <> '') AS `HasTrip`
    FROM `tblOrders` AS `t`

) AS `t0`
